calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-16-2026 Continued To Jul-22-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marivel Zialcita for Maria Angela De Campo Mirasol (petitioner) (via zoom).

Counsel stated that she has been having staffing issues, that the supplement is ready to file, that she does have the death certificates, and that she will attach the remote appearance information. The matter is continued to July 22, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge:Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.
